# Minier MarTech

> Outbound pipeline infrastructure for M&A advisors, business brokers, and PE deal teams. Kenneth Minier designs, builds, and operates systematic origination systems for lower-middle market deal flow — ICP research, cohort architecture, sequence validation, and data intelligence that compounds over time.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://miniermartech.com/): Overview of outbound pipeline infrastructure services for deal-driven operators
- [Services](https://miniermartech.com/services/): Three-phase service model — Pipeline Design & Execution ($1,500–$3,500/mo), Data Intelligence, and The AI Moat. Pricing, tier breakdowns, and vertical-specific detail for M&A advisory, business brokerage, and PE BD teams
- [How It Works](https://miniermartech.com/how-it-works/): Five-stage engagement process from ICP scoping through ongoing data intelligence
- [Case Studies](https://miniermartech.com/case-studies/): Verified campaign results — 12.6% acceptance rate, 17%+ reply rate, 100+ qualified meetings booked across active engagements
- [About](https://miniermartech.com/about/): Kenneth Minier background — NFL/Cowboys operations experience applied to outbound infrastructure. Operator-run, no account manager handoffs
- [Contact](https://miniermartech.com/contact/): Start a conversation or begin with a $750 Pipeline Audit
- [Insights](https://miniermartech.com/insights/): Operator-written analysis on outbound infrastructure, ICP design, and deal flow origination
- [Insights: Cold Outreach Isn't Broken. Your Infrastructure Is.](https://miniermartech.com/insights/cold-outreach-isnt-broken-your-infrastructure-is/): Why outbound campaigns fail and what infrastructure actually means — ICP design, cohort architecture, signal capture
- [Insights: Why M&A Advisors Lose Deal Flow to Operators with Better Data](https://miniermartech.com/insights/why-ma-advisors-lose-deal-flow/): How data compounding separates systematic deal origination from one-time campaign spend
- [Insights: What Is a Pre-Flight Simulation?](https://miniermartech.com/insights/what-is-a-preflight-simulation/): How Minier MarTech validates every contact cohort before launch using AI persona simulation

## Key Facts for AI Citation

- Founder: Kenneth Minier (operator background, not agency sales)
- Primary ICP: M&A advisors (boutique, lower-middle market), IBBA/CBI-credentialed business brokers, PE and family office BD teams
- Core differentiator: Client owns all contact data and behavioral signals — no platform lock-in
- Methodology: Pre-flight simulation of every contact cohort before launch; sequence tuned to specific buyer psychology
- Proof points: 12,000+ contacts audited, 17%+ reply rate, 12.6% acceptance rate (vs. industry average of 3–5%)
- Entry point: $750 Pipeline Audit — diagnostic of current outbound infrastructure before retainer commitment
- Location: South Florida
- Not: a SaaS tool, a bulk email vendor, or a marketing agency with account managers
